{{Quote|Your Master Lucien is the scion of an important family—both in the Republic and in the Jedi Order.|[[Vandar Tokare]] to [[Zayne Carrick]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Commencement">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Commencement]]''</ref>}}
The '''Draay family''' was, by the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], one of the most influential and powerful [[Human/Legends|Human]] families in both the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi Order]]. However, it had been a powerful business family long before it started producing [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]]; according to [[Arvan Carrick]], "every time the Draays were knighted, the markets shook."

They were apparently long-served by members of the [[Haazen]] family, as stewards and assistants.

Notable Draays included [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Krynda Draay]] and her son, the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Lucien Draay]]. Krynda's husband and Lucien's father, [[Barrison Draay|Barrison]], had been a great warrior Jedi who died during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. [[Krynda Draay's sister|Krynda's sister]], apparently also a Jedi, died in the war as well.

Several sons of [[House Praji/Legends|House Praji]] married daughters of the Draay family, resulting in several Praji Jedi Knights like [[Derrica Praji]] until the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] enacted its marriage proscriptions in the aftermath of the Great Sith War.

The family was based on the [[Draay Estate]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It also operated the [[Draay Trust]].
